notes: sw.js robustness. Replaces cache.addAll() with Promise.allSettled per-URL adds so one failing precache entry no longer aborts the entire install. Removes the broken './' entry (returned 404 from Pages; the canonical entry point is dct-ios.html, already first in PRECACHE_URLS). Extracts isCacheableScheme(req) helper as one source of truth for http(s)-only filtering — used at the fetch top-guard AND at the cache.put site for defense-in-depth against chrome-extension:// scheme errors. skipWaiting and the activate-handler eviction + clients.claim() are unchanged from prior versions. No application code touched (phantom_parseMaster, PHANTOM_MASTER_STORE, EDP/BOM/deploy/Ghost Echo all byte-identical).
